description: This is a Java entity class representing an application user in a Spring Boot project, including its properties, annotations for ORM mapping, and accessor methods.

classes.name: AppUser
classes.description: Entity class for user data related to authentication and authorization.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Updates the 'updatedAt' timestamp before the entity is persisted.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Checks if the user account is enabled.

methods.name: isMfaEnabled
methods.description: Checks if multi-factor authentication is enabled.

methods.name: getMfaEmail
methods.description: Returns the email associated with MFA.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp of account creation.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp of the last update.

methods.name: getRoles
methods.description: Returns the set of roles assigned to the user.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Assigns a UUID to the user.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables the user account.

methods.name: setMfaEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables MFA for the user.
